DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Teresa Li, Esq. 415-830-9686 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Tim Fama, Esq. 415-554-3800 Deputy City Attorney of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CCSF.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues Chalmers and cites 244 CAL APP 4th 1. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT,

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the single cause of action alleged by plaintiff Guo Xi Chen in the first amended complaint is overruled. Both parties refer to the City's claim rejection notice and the court takes judicial notice of it as a matter not reasonably subject to dispute. That notice does not include the mandatory warning language regarding seeking the advice of an attorney prescribed by Government Code 913(b). Per Chalmers v. County of Los Angeles (1985) 175 Cal.App.3d 461, 465, failure to include the required warning language extends the time for filing suit to two years. Chalmers is on-point authority that this court is required to follow in the absence of any case law stating that the required warning does not extend the time to file suit when the claimant is represented by counsel.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
